name: AI Deep Research Agent
description: Performs multi-query Exa search for comprehensive research, deep scrapes top results with Firecrawl, Claude AI synthesizes a structured research report with executive summary, key findings, and data points, then saves the report to Notion with content split into blocks of 1900 characters or fewer.

source.originalName: Host your own AI deep research agent with n8n, Apify and OpenAI o3

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for deep scraping

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for saving research report

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID where the research report will be created

researchTopic.description: Research topic or question (e.g. 'State of AI agents in enterprise 2025')

steps.name: Generate multiple search queries for deep research
Collect top URLs for deep scraping
Deep scrape top results with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for research synthesis
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Build Notion page content with blocks <=1900 chars
Create Notion page with research report
